dashboard.title: Something went wrong!
dashboard.description: An unexpected error occurred while loading this page. Please try again.

settings.title: Settings failed to load
settings.description: Try again. If this keeps happening, inspect the latest server logs.

admin.title: Admin data failed to load
admin.description: Retry the request after the server settles.

notFound.title: Oops! Page Not Found!
notFound.description: It seems like the page you're looking for does not exist or might have been removed.
